title: Factory Pipeline Cost Record
description: One line of the JSONL cost stream emitted by the factory pipeline (Phase 5.7). Reference artifact for human readers and future tooling. NOT wired into validate.ts; the pure TypeScript types in tools/pipeline/cost.ts are the authoritative contract today (Phase 4.6 schemas-as-documentation decision).

run_id.description: Unique id for the pipeline invocation that produced this row. Matches the run_id in the events stream.

packet_id.description: Packet under which this invocation was made, or null when the invocation was outside a packet context (e.g. orchestrator-level planner calls).

spec_id.description: Spec under which this invocation was made, or null when outside a spec context.

model.description: Resolved model id, or null when no model was resolved.

tokens_in.description: Input tokens reported by the provider, or null if the provider does not report token counts.

tokens_out.description: Output tokens reported by the provider, or null if not reported.

dollars.description: Derived dollar cost from rate-card lookup, or null when token counts are null OR no rate-card entry exists for (provider, model). Null is the honest 'we do not know' signal — null-dollar records are NOT counted toward caps.

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 timestamp (UTC) when the invocation was recorded.
